summary: Cleanup.Tests.ps1 covers core policies and dry-run/error handling adequately, but lacks rigor for edge cases (empty artifacts, boundary conditions like MaxAgeDays=0, validation of all policy negatives). Critical gaps: validation tests missing for MaxTotalSizeBytes and KeepLatestPerWorkflow negative values (code validates these but tests don't verify). Harness.Tests.ps1 is non-functional—references fixtures/default.json and fixtures/size-only.json that aren't provided, causing immediate file-not-found failures. Mutable test state (script:deletedNames) without between-test cleanup could cause flakiness. Missing .github/workflows/artifact-cleanup-script.yml and .actrc files make act integration untestable. Would catch happy-path regressions but fail on edge cases and boundary conditions.
